source_evidence.verified_defect: GPT sandbox package active work packet could still use Cursor work-cycle template and omit Persona ingress/response phases.
source_evidence.verified_behavior_risk: Connector reflex could override sandbox/package debug lane and collapse mount taxonomy claims.

repairs: Added explicit Connector Containment Override to Custom GPT instructions.
Added mount taxonomy separating uploaded package/sandbox mounted, sandbox preflight ready, connector reachable, local hub state read, external agents invoked, and state accepted/receipted.
Patched GPT_SANDBOX_CARRIER phase sequence to require PERSONA_INTERFACE_INGRESS and PERSONA_INTERFACE_RESPONSE.
Patched GPT_SANDBOX_CARRIER capability profile to declare can_use_mcp false and no production/live authority.
Patched sandbox preflight to ignore stale active-packet capabilities from a different carrier id.
Promoted/synced sandbox preflight, single-carrier sequence runner, stale-surface audit, and related protocol/template surfaces into the Custom GPT package.
Added protocol-dispute Persona gate requiring a visible Persona envelope or persona_gate_blocked.
Added focused regression tests for connector containment, mount taxonomy, sandbox carrier onboarding, stale-surface blocking, persona gate, and OpenAPI explicit-use descriptions.
Regenerated package-local ACTIVE_WORK_PACKET, ACTIVE_GPT_SANDBOX_PREFLIGHT, ACTIVE_SINGLE_CARRIER_SEQUENCE_PACKET, ACTIVE_SINGLE_CARRIER_SEQUENCE_RECEIPT, and ACTIVE_STALE_SURFACE_AUDIT after tests.

validation.command: package-local carrier onboarding, sandbox preflight, single-carrier sequence generation, stale-surface audit
validation.result: ready verdicts with GPT sandbox single-carrier template and Persona ingress/response phases

operational_correction.cause: Initial zip command used an unquoted absolute path containing spaces.
operational_correction.repair: Removed after explicit approval and rebuilt artifact with quoted path inside active root.

non_claims: This receipt does not accept the Custom GPT self-audit as state.
This receipt does not certify production readiness.
This receipt does not certify live connector health.
This receipt does not grant Custom GPT authority to call Action Gateway or MCP by default.
This receipt does not mutate the active root Codex carrier packet away from its own carrier lane.
next_packet: Upload v2.6.3 as the main Custom GPT knowledge zip and paste 001_GPT_INSTRUCTIONS_PASTE.md into the GPT instructions field. Keep Action Gateway and MCP Actions configured as explicit-use-only connector surfaces.
